description: Risk-tiered approval policies for all platform lanes. Maps risk tiers to approval channels, timeouts, and escalation paths.

low.label: Low Risk
low.description: Read-only, idempotent, or fully reversible operations with no external posting.

medium.label: Medium Risk
medium.description: Write operations with clear rollback. No external publishing or mass actions.

high.label: High Risk
high.description: External publishing, agent-initiated sends, workflow changes, or user-visible mutations.

critical.label: Critical Risk
critical.description: Irreversible or high-blast-radius operations. Hard human gate required.

d1_ceo.note: CEO can self-approve high-risk actions. Critical still requires explicit confirmation.

shared_exec_orchestrator.note: Exec orchestrator can approve medium and forward high to Telegram.

global_circuit_breaker.description: If >3 high or critical actions are rejected within 60 minutes, pause all high/critical operations and alert operator.

human_override_switch.description: Operator can disable all autonomous execution across all lanes.
